summary: Tested Fiscal Data Capture feature for POS System. FiscalDataDrawer component works correctly - opens when B01, B14, or B15 NCF types are selected from payment screen. RNC validation (9 digits) and Cédula validation (11 digits with Luhn warning) both functional. Customer search by RNC API endpoint working. Backend and frontend integration verified.
passed_tests: FiscalDataDrawer opens when B01 (Crédito Fiscal) selected from NCF dialog
FiscalDataDrawer opens when B15 (Régimen Especial) selected
RNC validation (9 digits): Shows green checkmark + formatted RNC (131-09801-7)
Cédula validation (11 digits): Shows amber warning icon + formatted Cédula with 'verificar manualmente' message
Customer search by RNC: API endpoint GET /api/customers?rnc=XXXXX working
New customer indicator: 'Cliente nuevo - Ingresa los datos' message when RNC not found
Razón Social input enabled for manual entry when customer not found
Continue button enables when valid RNC + Razón Social entered
Cancel button closes drawer without saving
B02 (Consumidor Final) does NOT open drawer - direct flow
Backend: Customer search by RNC returns empty array for non-existent RNC
Backend: Customer creation with RNC field works
Backend: Customer search finds newly created customer by RNC
Backend: Sale types include default_ncf_type_id field
critical_code_review_comments: FiscalDataDrawer.jsx implements proper RNC/Cédula validation - flexible approach for legacy RNCs
PaymentScreen.js L1454-1457: Correctly triggers drawer for B01/B14/B15 fiscal types
customers.py L31-55: RNC search endpoint properly handles formatted/unformatted RNC
billing.py L340: pay_bill accepts fiscal_id, razon_social fields as expected
All data-testid attributes present for testing: fiscal-id-input, search-customer-btn, razon-social-input, fiscal-confirm-btn, fiscal-cancel-btn, ncf-dialog-B01/B14/B15

features_verified.drawer_opens_for_b01: PASS - Drawer opens with title 'Datos Fiscales - B01', subtitle 'Crédito Fiscal requiere RNC o Cédula del cliente'
features_verified.drawer_opens_for_b14: PASS - Drawer opens with title 'Datos Fiscales - B14'
features_verified.drawer_opens_for_b15: PASS - Drawer opens with title 'Datos Fiscales - B15', subtitle 'Régimen Especial requiere RNC o Cédula del cliente'
features_verified.rnc_validation_9_digits: PASS - Shows '✓ RNC válido: 131-09801-7' with green checkmark
features_verified.cedula_validation_11_digits: PASS - Shows '⚠ Cédula aceptado: 001-1234567-8 (verificar manualmente)' with amber warning
features_verified.customer_search_by_rnc: PASS - API returns empty array for non-existent, finds existing customers
features_verified.autocomplete_existing_customer: NOT TESTED - No customers with RNC in database to test autocomplete
features_verified.new_customer_manual_entry: PASS - Shows 'Cliente nuevo - Ingresa los datos' message, enables Razón Social input
features_verified.continue_button_validation: PASS - Button disabled until valid RNC + Razón Social entered, then enabled

context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiscal Data Capture feature fully tested. FiscalDataDrawer opens when B01/B14/B15 selected from NCF dialog in PaymentScreen. RNC (9 digits) validates format only, Cédula (11 digits) validates with Luhn algorithm but allows continuation with warning. Customer search endpoint works. To test autocomplete of existing customer data, add a customer with RNC field populated first.

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs for this feature - all endpoints are real
